title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Amityville, NY | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Amityville, Long Island. Humane bat control, attic cleanup, and permanent exclusion. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Amityville homeowners facing bat infestations need fast, humane, and effective solutions to protect their families and properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Amityville and surrounding Long Island communities. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to safely remove bats and prevent future entry, ensuring your home remains bat-free year-round.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife control experience to Amityville residents, combining humane removal techniques with permanent exclusion solutions. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained in New York State bat protection laws, ensuring compliant and effective service for your Long Island home.
localContext: Amityville's historic homes, including many Victorian and Colonial-style residences near the Great South Bay, often feature older attics and rooflines that provide ideal entry points for bats. The village's tree-lined streets and proximity to wetlands create abundant bat habitats, making professional exclusion services essential for protecting your property from these nocturnal visitors.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Amityville typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, colony size, number of entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bat removal in New York must follow strict regulations. Bats cannot be excluded during maternity season (May 1 - August 15) when flightless young are present. Best Pest Control NYC follows all New York State Department of Environmental Conservation guidelines to ensure humane, legal bat removal in Amityville.

faqs.question: What does the bat exclusion process involve?
faqs.answer: Our bat exclusion process includes a thorough inspection to identify entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not return, sealing all potential entry points with durable materials, attic sanitation and decontamination if needed, and a warranty to ensure bats don't return to your Amityville home.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bats from my Amityville home?
faqs.answer: We can typically begin the inspection and exclusion process within 24-48 hours of your call. The complete exclusion process usually takes 3-7 days for bats to vacate, followed by permanent sealing. During maternity season, we'll schedule service for after August 15th to comply with New York regulations protecting young bats.
